ocr_findings.description: Top of image contains text starting mid-paragraph: 'プログラムはコンピュータへの命令書、データベースは…' — the page clearly continues from a previous page, but the OCR file also starts mid-paragraph identically. This is correct continuation behavior, not a loss.
Section heading rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' in OCR; image shows '試験にはコレが出る！' with a mascot logo. The katakana コレ is rendered as hiragana つし — character recognition error in the heading graphic/logo text
Section heading '基本的な考え方の重要' in OCR; image shows '基本的な考え方が重要' — particle が rendered as の, minor character error in heading
Decorative 学習のポイント box image (mascot + heading) replaced with img-0.jpeg placeholder at end of file; the surrounding bullet-point content is captured correctly

reviewer_notes: 著作権法 content page. All substantive body text, bullet list of 3 non-protected items (プログラム言語/アルゴリズム/プロトコル), and summary box bullets faithfully reproduced. Two minor heading character errors (コレ→つし, が→の) are cosmetic and do not affect learning content. WARN due to 2 low-severity character findings in headings.
